title: rubus gymnostachys
intro: Rubus gymnostachys, also known as the Australian native blackberry, is a type of shrub that belongs to the Rosaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus gymnostachys include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. In herbal preparations, Rubus gymnostachys can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
